title: Flight status lookup
text: Check real-time flight status by providing the flight number (e.g., EK-201) or route (e.g., Lagos to Abuja). Status updates include departure time, arrival time, gate information, and delay notifications. Alerts available via SMS.

title: Baggage allowance and policies
text: Economy: 1 checked bag (23kg) + 1 carry-on (7kg). Business: 2 checked bags (32kg each) + 1 carry-on (10kg). Excess baggage: NGN 5,000/kg domestic, NGN 15,000/kg international. Oversized items require advance booking.

title: Flight rebooking and changes
text: Flex tickets: free rebooking up to 2 hours before departure. Standard tickets: NGN 10,000 change fee + fare difference. Basic tickets: non-changeable, but name corrections are allowed (NGN 5,000). All changes subject to availability.

title: Delay and cancellation compensation
text: Delays over 2 hours: complimentary refreshments. Delays over 4 hours: meal voucher + rebooking option. Cancellations: full refund or free rebooking to next available flight. Weather-related cancellations: rebooking only (no refund).
